title: F1 Fantasy
description: An iOS app where users compete as fantasy F1 team principals, building rosters and scoring points based on real race results.

title: Lakes Area Flight Instruction
description: A responsive Vue-based website for a flight school, designed with custom animated sections, aircraft pages, and a polished landing experience focused on clear navigation and visual storytelling.

title: Traffic Simulator
description: A Python library for simulating traffic systems including vehicles, intersections, and congestion patterns.
